query: SELECT e.id, e.title as event_title, sw.title as webinar_title, sw.youtubeLink, e.videoLink FROM events e LEFT JOIN scheduled_webinars sw ON LOWER(TRIM(e.title)) = LOWER(TRIM(sw.title)) ORDER BY e.eventDate DESC LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT e.id, e.title as event_title, sw.title as webinar_title, sw.youtubeLink, e.videoLink FROM events e LEFT JOIN scheduled_webinars sw ON LOWER(TRIM(e.title)) = LOWER(TRIM(sw.title)) ORDER BY e.eventDate DESC LIMIT 15;
